entry.title: I'll Bleed Until I Find You
entry.summary:
Author: MoonlitRescue

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,940Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck goes back into the water without thinking, without caring that his leg is already failing him or that the current is still strong enough to drag him out to sea. Buck finds Christopher. He brings him back. But when he wakes up, all he can remember is the moment Christopher was gone, the broken glasses in his hand, and Eddie’s trust turning into something Buck no longer thinks he deserves. Or What if Buck saved Christopher from the tsunami, and woke up convinced Eddie would never trust him again?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Forgive Me, Father
entry.summary:
Author: 79KJ01

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,440Chapters: 27/30Kudos: 82

Summary: Buck only means to go to confession once. Instead, he finds himself returning to the same church again and again for reasons that have absolutely nothing to do with religion and everything to do with one devastatingly kind priest named Eddie Diaz. What starts as awkward conversations and accidental emotional vulnerability slowly becomes something far more dangerous: feelings. Unfortunately for Buck, falling for a priest is a terrible idea. Even more unfortunate? It might not just be him.

entry.title: the stranger that I once loved, the love I can´t leave
entry.summary:
Author: Potatozoo43lamas

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 660Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck and Eddie are two teen girl who first meet at 15 and 14 in Eddies hometown, wen Buck gets send away over the summer to spend some time with her uncle, pester Nash of the town. over the next years she comes back every summer until her last one at 18, tell in her best friend Eddie she can´t ever come back and they will never meat again. Over there next years they go different ways, one balding a life for herself the other barley living. (this summery sucks and I promises the actual story is hopefully better)

entry.title: No one left to call
entry.summary:
Author: budding

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,027Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 15

Summary: Post-lawsuit, Buck is broke. He’s drowning in medical bills and lawyer fees and he has no one to turn to for help.His chosen family aren’t speaking to him unless it’s to bark orders at him on shift, still pissed about the lawsuit, so Buck suffers in silence. Faced with a medical emergency, Buck calls Eddie to beg. Except, Eddie doesn’t even give Buck a chance to speak when he answers. ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ Pre-buddie that becomes buddie

entry.title: third time's the charm
entry.summary:
Author: likes_koolaid

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,726Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 22

Summary: “I’ve loved you ever since I’ve known you, Eddie, and I—” “Why’re you quoting Little Women at me right now?” Eddie interrupts. Buck huffs. He didn’t exactly plan out what he was going to say, but he had a loose idea, and it certainly wasn’t Little Women. “I— I’m not quoting Little Women.” “Yes, you are,” Eddie insists. “No, I’m not! I’m telling you I’m in love with you!” or, Buck and Eddie finally get their romantic love confession, even if it takes a couple of tries

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Firefighter Exchange Program
entry.summary:
Author: SarInTheStars

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,200Chapters: 1/15Kudos: 0

Summary: “As I’m sure you know, we’ve been working on a much-needed city-wide reformation of the NYPD and the FDNY. I’ve been tasked with finding an innovative way to move our firefighters into this next chapter," Chief Strand tells them. “Respectfully, sir, what does that have to do with us?” Eddie asks when it seems like the others aren’t going to. “I’m developing a Firefighter Exchange Program with a pilot run happening this summer. We’ll take two firefighters from a dozen major cities and swap them in for 8 weeks. Your crew is the first I thought of.” Eddie doesn’t need more than a second to consider. “I’ll do it.” OR A summer in NYC is exactly what Buck and Eddie need after a year of loss and grief. With Chris attending a Science Program in Brooklyn, Buck and Eddie participate in the NYC Firefighter Exchange Program and learn more about themselves than they expect. From getting to know a whole new team, to reconnecting with old friends, to attending the NYC Pride March - they've got an entire summer ahead of them to figure things out.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Little One
entry.summary:
Author: Nana_Raptor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 483,430Chapters: 61/61Kudos: 609

Summary: A fairly ordinary morning is turning into a nightmare of unreal propotions:Buck has to deal with an unexpected turn of events, and his family has to deal with the consequences.While everyone tries to uphold their hopes that he's out there, Buck fights to keep his sanity and to find a way to keep himself alive.---or: A very dark and explicit fiction about Buck being victim to a predetor who is in over his head (even if he doesn't know just yet), when he tries to get away with kidnapping someone, who is dear and important to a certain fire fam.

entry.title: don't let go
entry.summary:
Author: idyllic_dae

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,025Chapters: 1/3Kudos: 6

Summary: Buck isn't looking, but he can feel the presence of someone else climb in with him. They situate themselves in the narrow space between the center console and the seats. A hand lands on the back of his neck, ensuring he doesn't move from this position. The pressure is firm, but not cruel. "Relax," Red whispers in his ear, low and husky. "Enjoy the ride." Buck hears doors slam and the shifting of gears. The car lurches, and so does his stomach, because it's evident that nobody is going to find him now. Relax? Impossible. He's going to be killed, his body will be buried in the middle of the desert, and he didn't even thank Eddie for the coffee this morning. Or: Because Buck's life can never be simple, he finds himself with a gun pressed against the back of his head, in the middle of a feud that has nothing to do with him, and with five pounds of C-4 strapped to his chest. Somehow, that's not even the worst part.

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: LMR95

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 173,267Chapters: 43/?Kudos: 104

Summary: He takes Buck's hand, like he has the right, and sees the evidence of Buck's devotion, a love letter written in blood, etched into every fingertip in a fit of desperation, and Eddie is overwhelmed with his love.The dam that broke as he fought for air no longer exists, and he doesn't know how to exist without shouting wordlessly about his love for Buck with every fiber of his being, with every word he says, every touch, every look, every breath.He knows he should be worried, he should try to hide it better, because he cannot risk it, cannot risk destroying what they have, but he is too tired, too woozy, too hurt.So he holds Buck’s hand, and looks into his eyes, that hold all the light of his existence. It feels like standing in the light of his personal sun, wrapped in its warmth.⸻⸻⸻ ₊⁺ ༻ ☼ ༺ ⁺₊ ⸻⸻⸻My rewrite from mid season 2 up to the shooting and its aftermath.

entry.title: things that probably mean nothing
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,495Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 9

Summary: “Apparently journaling helps with emotional processing.” Which would be great if Buck were processing literally anything except Eddie Diaz. Told entirely through diary entries spanning nearly two years, this is the story of Buck accidentally documenting every stage of falling in love with his best friend while remaining aggressively oblivious about it

entry.summary:
Author: belliesandoo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,525Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: Eddie's rules:1. Don't let anyone in.2. Handle everything alone.3. Do not, under any circumstances, fall for your partner. Buck has broken all three. Repeatedly. Without apology.Eddie is this close to being okay with it.

entry.title: My name is yours to keep
entry.summary:
Author: Elgcarres

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 132,676Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 226

Summary: ... He doesn't want to hear his name ever again. He might change it. Eddie ruined his name because only Eddie could use his name properly.And he still uses it… properly.***It started as a fix-it story for 'Lab Rats'. It doesn't go well *** What if there's Eddie in the lab What if it's him who dies instead of Bobby. Kinda.

entry.title: Forgetting something?
entry.summary:
Author: Fictionfan321

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,553Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 33

Summary: Buck has a feeling he's forgetting something. He just can't put his finger on what. Until he receives an angry phone call Also don't hate me for this but chris is younger then in canon. Theo is 4 and chris is 9. I wanted them a bit closer in age and young enough to ask what certain words mean that older kids will understand. It might make sense in this story.

entry.title: I'll Say I Love You (And Mean It This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: leastproblematicintern

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,016Chapters: 8/13Kudos: 128

Summary: Buck's not sure what he expected: silence, most definitely, perhaps some localized pain from the burns and the force of the blast. Not this. He can't hear the beeping of the machines or the raised voices of the nurses and doctors. He can't hear Eddie or Maddie or anyone he knows trying to find out what's happening over the chaos. He can't hear anything at all except the ringing, the ringing, the ringing. ... After an incident at work leaves Buck near-completely deaf, Buck and Eddie have to navigate a new version of life while also ignoring the giant elephant in the room.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: But, You’re My Idiot
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,080Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 253

Summary: It starts at the firefighter auction. With Buck on stage.With a smile Eddie can’t return.With a feeling he doesn’t understand—and refuses to name. Because it shouldn’t matter. It’s just Buck. Right? It would be easier if it was. Some lines don’t blur.Some lines were never even there. And some feelings? They don’t stay buried. No matter how hard they try.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: you were unsuspecting, not unwarned
entry.summary:
Author: paleredheadinascifi

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,466Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 646

Summary: “Hey, Diaz? Take it from someone who’s been there — it’s not as scary as you think it’ll be.”Eddie frowns. He glances at Buck, as if Buck has any idea what Tommy is talking about. “What’s not?”“I like to think I’m uniquely positioned to say it’s worth it.”Or, Buck is not in love with his best friend, and Eddie is super straight. For sure. Definitely.

entry.title: I'm losing myself in you, and you, and you
entry.summary:
Author: MelancholyGhoul

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,936Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 175

Summary: 'That firefighter you met during the wildfires?' He asked, 'You sure do speak to him a lot, mi vida.' 'No I don't!' He scoffed light-heartedly, 'I speak to him a totally normal amount.' Carlos smiled, 'Even if you did, you light up whenever you do. You get that twinkle in your eye, redness in your cheeks...' He looked at him with insistence, all he got in response was a confused look, 'you like him Tyler.' TK sat up straight and swallowed a lump in his throat, is that what this was? The jokes and the late night conversations? Oh my God... they were flirting, 'I-I love you, Carlos.' He stated, Carlos just laughed. 'I didn't say you didn't.' -------------or------------- Buck, Carlos, Eddie and TK each figure out what [and who] really make them happy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
